description: Chrome Management API lets administrators view, manage, and get insights about ChromeOS devices and Chrome browsers in their organization. It is part of Google's Chrome enterprise/admin tooling.
summary: Chrome Management exposes one REST API at https://chromemanagement.googleapis.com/ for managing and reporting on ChromeOS devices and Chrome browsers; it accepts Google OAuth 2.0 access tokens, service-account OAuth tokens, and the `key` query API key parameter.
